title: Hook Feature Toggles
description: Enable/disable switches for the stamped hook features (ADR-0006). One boolean per feature; the per-feature scripts in .claude/hooks/ read this at every firing and no-op when their toggle is off, missing, or malformed (fail safe). Defaults at stamp: gate_reminders on; message_nudge, load_reporting, viewer_server, spawn_guard, progress_location_guard, channel_guard, and grounding_pack off. spawn_guard, progress_location_guard, channel_guard, and grounding_pack are optional (not required) so configs stamped before they existed stay schema-valid (this file is variant-classed — update never refreshes it).

gate_reminders.description: PostToolUse reminder + Stop block when gate-relevant paths are edited without a recorded gate verdict.

message_nudge.description: Follow-through nudge in the sender's session after a teammate message (EXEC-044).

viewer_server.description: SessionStart auto-start of the localhost viewer server — idempotent start, idle self-exit, discovery record in .excn/viewer-server_progress.json (EXEC-054).

spawn_guard.description: PreToolUse deny when a one-shot agent spawn requests a type listed in spawn_guard_persistent_types (EXEC-064).

progress_location_guard.description: PreToolUse deny when a *_progress.json Record write targets a path outside the two homes .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/ (EXEC-070, ADR-0008); location only.

channel_guard.description: PreToolUse deny when a raw Write/Edit targets a path under .excn/issues/ or .excn/sprints/, redirecting to the to-execution CLI (EXEC-100, ADR-0011); channel only, the writeRecord helper is the sole write path.

grounding_pack.description: PostToolUse regenerate of the Grounding Pack (.excn/runtime/grounding-pack.json) when a source (.excn/schemas/*, .excn/CONTEXT.md, .excn/adr/*) is newer-or-equal than the pack (sprint-11 S4, ADR speculative-prewarm-runtime-staging); regenerate-class, in-process, fail-safe — never blocks.

spawn_guard_persistent_types.description: This Instance's rostered persistent-Teammate types (TEAM_DIRECTIVE roster); spawn_guard denies one-shot spawns of these. Per-Instance state — edit alongside the roster.
